scripts.bootstrap: uv sync --extra dev --extra local-asr && pnpm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,api,orchestrator,media,llm -c magenta,cyan,yellow,green,blue "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:orchestrator" "pnpm dev:worker:media" "pnpm dev:worker:llm"
scripts.test: pnpm run test:frontend && pnpm run test:backend
scripts.build:backend: uv run python -m py_compile src/roughcut/main.py src/roughcut/cli.py
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:frontend && pnpm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:backend: uv run ruff check src tests
